checks.name: owner_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if owner, in viewACL, in manageACL, or publicAccess is view/edit

checks.name: modify_safety
checks.description: ModifyDocument for User principals is only allowed if owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess is edit

checks.name: delete_safety
checks.description: DeleteDocument is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_is_private_safety
checks.description: EditIsPrivate is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: edit_public_access_safety
checks.description: EditPublicAccess is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: add_to_share_acl_safety
checks.description: AddToShareACL is only allowed if owner or in manageACL

checks.name: public_view_safety
checks.description: ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit

checks.name: delete_group_safety
checks.description: DeleteGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner

checks.name: modify_group_safety
checks.description: ModifyGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner

checks.name: auth_required_view
checks.description: User principals cannot ViewDocument when not authenticated

checks.name: auth_required_modify
checks.description: User principals cannot ModifyDocument when not authenticated

checks.name: auth_required_delete
checks.description: User principals cannot DeleteDocument when not authenticated

checks.name: owner_floor_view
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated and not blocked (or in manageACL)

checks.description: Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated and not blocked (or in manageACL)

checks.name: owner_floor_delete
checks.description: Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated

checks.description: Users in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated (and in manageACL to bypass blocks)

checks.description: Users in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated (and in manageACL to bypass blocks)

checks.name: group_owner_floor_delete
checks.description: Group owner MUST be able to DeleteGroup when authenticated

results.description: ViewDocument for User principals is only allowed if owner, in viewACL, in manageACL, or publicAccess is view/edit
ModifyDocument for User principals is only allowed if owner, in modifyACL, or publicAccess is edit
DeleteDocument is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
EditIsPrivate is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
EditPublicAccess is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
AddToShareACL is only allowed if owner or in manageACL
ViewDocument for Public principals is only allowed if publicAccess is view or edit
DeleteGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner
ModifyGroup is only allowed if principal is the group owner
User principals cannot ViewDocument when not authenticated
User principals cannot ModifyDocument when not authenticated
User principals cannot DeleteDocument when not authenticated
Owner MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated and not blocked (or in manageACL)
Owner MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated and not blocked (or in manageACL)
Owner MUST be able to DeleteDocument when authenticated
Users in viewACL MUST be able to ViewDocument when authenticated (and in manageACL to bypass blocks)
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: User::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: true}
entities: [
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  User::"" in [DocumentShare::"", DocumentShare::"A"] {
    blocked: [User::""],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  DocumentShare::"B",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  User::"A" in [DocumentShare::"", DocumentShare::"A"] {
    blocked: [User::""],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Document::"" {
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"B",
    owner: User::"A",
    publicAccess: "",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"",
  },
  DocumentShare::"",
]

results.description: Users in modifyACL MUST be able to ModifyDocument when authenticated (and in manageACL to bypass blocks)
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:

entities: [
  Action::"DeleteDocument",

  DocumentShare::"B",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Document::"" {
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"",
    owner: User::"A",
    publicAccess: "",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"B",
  },
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  User::"A" in [DocumentShare::"A", DocumentShare::""] {
    blocked: [User::""],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  User::"" in [DocumentShare::"", DocumentShare::"A"] {
    blocked: [User::""],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  DocumentShare::"",
]

results.description: Users in manageACL MUST be able to AddToShareACL when authenticated
Public principal MUST be able to ViewDocument when publicAccess is view
results.counterexample:
✗ Policy set 1 implies policy set 2: DOES NOT HOLD
  Counterexample found:
principal: Public::"", action: Action::"ViewDocument", resource: Document::""
context: {is_authenticated: false}
entities: [
  Action::"AddToShareACL",
  Action::"CreateDocument",
  Action::"DeleteGroup",
  User::"" {
    blocked: [],
    personalGroup: Group::"",
  },
  Action::"EditPublicAccess",
  Group::"" {
    owner: User::"",
  },
  DocumentShare::"",
  Action::"ViewDocument",
  Public::"",
  Action::"ModifyDocument",
  DocumentShare::"B",
  Document::"" {
    isPrivate: true,
    manageACL: DocumentShare::"",
    modifyACL: DocumentShare::"A",
    owner: User::"",
    publicAccess: "view",
    viewACL: DocumentShare::"B",
  },
  DocumentShare::"A",
  Action::"CreateGroup",
  Action::"EditIsPrivate",
  Action::"ModifyGroup",
  Action::"DeleteDocument",
]
